title: royruddle/6-step-data-quality-method: The 6-step Data Quality Method (2nd edition)
author: Roy Ruddle
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This replaces the 1st edition, which was published as "A Practical Guide to Characterising Data and Investigating Data Quality" (https://doi.org/10.5518/1481). 
 This 2nd edition contains: 
 
 A document that describes 69 data quality/profiling tasks (2 renamed; 2 removed; 9 added) and 127 questions (47 revised or new) for you to answer about your data 
 A spreadsheet (.ods and .xlsx formats) mapping the tasks onto the six steps of the method 
 Links to YouTube videos about the method and Jupyter Notebooks used in the videos
